name: Strange Chocolate Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle butterscotch and chocolate chips over the bottom of the unbaked pie shell.
2. In a separate bowl, combine sugar, cocoa powder, and salt; set aside.
3. In a mixing bowl, whisk together eggs, melted margarine, evaporated milk, and vanilla extract until well combined.
4. Gradually add the sugar mixture to the egg mixture, stirring continuously.
5. Pour the batter over the chips in the pie shell.
6. Bake in a preheated 350-degree oven for 45-50 minutes.
Serve chilled with whipped cream.
